research_question: Can a directional/deictic motion predicate take a following overt goal?
verified_result: Yes; directional morphemes head or participate in motion expressions with following locative objects.
unresolved_limit: The study does not define the Canto Span node or every licensed predicate-goal pair.
parser_decision: Source-link only the bounded overt-goal profile.

research_question: Are runtime forms 去咗-place, 返咗-place, and 到咗-place attested?
verified_result: Yes; the thesis contains 去咗圖書館, 返咗屋企, and 到咗學校.
unresolved_limit: Examples in an aspect thesis do not prove exhaustive productivity.
parser_decision: Permit these reviewed predicate-aspect-goal profiles provisionally.

research_question: Does 返學 require an omitted 學校 analysis?
verified_result: No; 返學 and 返工 are described as lexicalized normal go-to-school/go-to-work expressions.
unresolved_limit: Other 返+noun sequences are not thereby lexicalized.
parser_decision: Preserve overt 學 and insert no hidden 學校.

research_question: Should all 到 sequences be one motion-goal construction?
source_checked: Chor 2018 PDF pp. 124-127; Leung 2026 appendix pp. 55-56
verified_result: No; 到 has arrival, post-directional, and nonspatial/result behavior that must be distinguished.
unresolved_limit: The sources do not supply a complete token-level disambiguation algorithm.
parser_decision: Keep 到 main-predicate, spatial V-到-goal, and nonspatial V-到-result profiles separate.

research_question: Is preverbal 由-source plus motion and an overt goal documented?
source_checked: Yip and Matthews 2000 PDF pp. 77 and 80; Leung 2026 pp. 26-28
verified_result: Yes; source precedes the motion predicate, and source-to-goal expressions are attested.
unresolved_limit: Optional subjects, time phrases, intervening material, and every motion predicate are not established.
parser_decision: Source-link only the overt source-motion-goal profile.

research_question: Can an action purpose follow a motion expression?
verified_result: Yes; the study codes a motion-cum-purpose phrase when the purpose immediately follows the motion clause.
unresolved_limit: The coding rule is not a universal syntactic test, and marked purposive 去/嚟 is separate.
parser_decision: Require immediate following plus semantic compatibility.

research_question: Do shared subject and adjacent verbs prove a purpose chain?
verified_result: No; subject sharing is compatible with serial constructions, but purpose, complement, compound, and coordination analyses can compete.
unresolved_limit: No deterministic surface-only classifier follows from the chapter.
parser_decision: Keep the label theory-neutral and reject adjacency-only inference.

research_question: Is 向-direction before 行 supported, and is it the same as route or reached goal?
source_checked: Yip and Matthews 2000 PDF p. 80; Leung 2014 pp. 1-3
verified_result: 向 before motion is supported; the reference grammar distinguishes 向 toward from 經 via and from source/goal relations.
unresolved_limit: Predicate inventory and productivity remain bounded.
parser_decision: Source-link the 向 direction/orientation subtype only.

research_question: Is the runtime 沿住-route subtype backed by a research-grade construction analysis?
source_checked: Full-text source set above; Open Cantonese Lesson 39 vocabulary page checked as pedagogical corroboration only
verified_result: The pedagogical page attests 沿 and notes frequent 沿住, but no verified research-grade source in this pass establishes the parser's span, relation, or productivity.
unresolved_limit: The search is not a proof that no such research exists.
parser_decision: Mark 沿住 subtype unsupported in R2 and require a PathPhrase split or narrowing.

research_question: Does preverbal 喺-place have the same function as postverbal 喺-place?
verified_result: No; the article distinguishes preverbal event/action location from postverbal result location.
unresolved_limit: The article does not cover every locative subtype in the runtime umbrella.
parser_decision: Do not export one undifferentiated locative role.

research_question: Are locative predicate, noun-localizer, and 喺度 distinctions documented?
verified_result: Yes; the reference grammar separately documents subject-led locative predicates, noun-localizer order, and locative versus progressive 喺度.
unresolved_limit: A teaching grammar does not establish productivity or one umbrella category.
parser_decision: Preserve the subtypes and require label narrowing or splitting.

research_question: Is the exact postnominal presentational coda 有個人喺門口 directly analyzed by the mapped research?
source_checked: Kwan 2010 and Yip and Matthews 2000 locative/existential sections
verified_result: No direct match was verified; the reference grammar's location-first existential examples do not establish the parser's NP-before-locative-coda structure.
